title: Day 38 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - もし　１しゅうかん やすむことが できたら、にほんに りょこうに いきたいです。= If I can manage to get a week off, I want to travel to Japan.

Sentence 2 - あきだったら、ろてんぶろに はいりたいです。= If it's Autumn, I want to go into an outdoor hot spring.

Sentence 3 - もし てんきが よかったら、きれいな こうようを みること が できますね。= If the weather is nice, I could see some pretty red autumn leaves.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
